pattern_en: No mention of 'Senshinteki Mado Rinobe 2026' subsidy (max 1M JPY)
pattern_ja: 先進的窓リノベ2026事業の説明なし
reason_en: Vendor unaware of (or refuses to apply for) the 2026 max-subsidy of 1M JPY/household disqualifies them.

pattern_en: Not a registered '2026 Housing Energy-Saving Support Vendor'
pattern_ja: 住宅省エネ2026支援事業者に登録していない
reason_en: Subsidy applications are vendor-side only. Non-registered vendors cannot deliver the subsidy.

pattern_en: Proposing A-grade (regular Low-E pair glass) which is excluded in 2026
pattern_ja: 2026年廃止のAグレード（普通Low-E複層ガラス）を提案
reason_en: A-grade inner windows are excluded from 2026 subsidy. Must be S-grade (Uw≤1.5) or higher.

pattern_en: Manufacturer / model / glass grade not specified
pattern_ja: メーカー・型番・ガラスグレード不明
reason_en: LIXIL Inplus vs YKK AP Plamado-U differ in price/performance. Ambiguity is fraud territory.

pattern_en: Inner window x1 quoted over 600K JPY
reason_en: HS standard for sliding door 496K JPY. Over 600K is overpricing.

pattern_en: Cover method x1 quoted over 500K JPY
reason_en: HS standard for sliding door 360K JPY. Over 500K overpriced.

pattern_en: Labor and materials lumped as single line item
pattern_ja: 工事費・材料費が『一式』計上
reason_en: Per-window itemization possible. Lumping suggests overpricing.

pattern_en: Charging over 30K JPY for subsidy application service
pattern_ja: 補助金申請代行費を¥30,000超請求
reason_en: Standard fee is 10-20K JPY. Higher fees are excessive.

pattern_en: Pushing demolition method when cover method suffices
pattern_ja: カバー工法で十分な案件にはつり工法強要
reason_en: If existing frame is sound, cover method is sufficient. Adds 100-300K JPY needlessly.

pattern_ja: 訪問販売で『補助金期限迫ってます』即決迫り
reason_en: Subsidies are budget-dependent but legitimate vendors do not pressure-close.

pattern_ja: 『補助金で無料になります』と言う
reason_en: Subsidies cover only a portion. 100% subsidies do not exist - this is fraud.

pattern_en: No disclosure of glass area reduction in cover method
pattern_ja: カバー工法で開口面積減少の説明なし
reason_en: Cover method reduces glass area by 5-10cm. Pre-disclosure is vendor honesty signal.

pattern_en: Self-claims to be a registered vendor but absent from official search
pattern_ja: 『当社は登録事業者です』と自称するが公式サイト検索で出ない

pattern_en: Made-up grades like 'SS+' or 'S++' not in official spec
pattern_ja: 『SS+』『S++』等、公式に存在しないグレード表記
reason_en: Official grades are P(SS)/S/A only. Marketing-only labels can mislead.

pattern_ja: 『玄関ドア単体で補助金出ます』と説明
reason_en: Door replacement requires concurrent window work for subsidy eligibility.
